title: Rough sleeping and complex needs process evaluation
body: "Four report from the evaluation examining how two funding initiatives – Rough Sleeping Grant (RSG) and Rough Sleeping Social Impact Bond (SIB) – provided support for people who had slept rough and had complex needs (co-occurring mental health and substance misuse needs).    The aim of the process evaluation was to provide evidence on different approaches taken to working with people who are sleeping rough who have co-occurring mental health and substance misuse needs, and to identify the lessons learned in designing, setting up and delivering these across the RSG and Rough Sleeping SIB funding programmes. "
